notes_zh:
- **新增** 接力模式大升级：齿轮设置弹层、粘贴后自动按键（Return/Tab/Space/↑↓←→）、绑定自动化规则、预览开关、面板宽度可拖拽
- **新增** 接力队列持久化：退出接力自动保留（含已粘贴/跳过状态），下次自动恢复
- **新增** 剪贴板监听开关持久化，菜单栏和设置双向同步
- **优化** 菜单栏文案统一为「暂停/恢复剪贴板监听」
- **优化** 接力面板底部按钮重组：暂停接力 / 退出 / 清空并退出
- **修复** 接力激活时 Cmd+Shift+V 等组合热键无法打开快捷面板
- **修复** 粘贴后按键（方向键）在 Excel 里被误判为 Ctrl+↑ 跳到顶部
- **修复** 接力编辑面板文字不可见（感谢 @lclrc 的 PR）
- **修复** WebDAV 明文 HTTP 连接失败
- **修复** 授权辅助功能后菜单栏提示不自动消失
notes_en:
- **New** Major Relay mode overhaul: gear settings popover, post-paste auto-key (Return/Tab/Space/↑↓←→), bind automation rule, preview toggle, drag-resizable panel width
- **New** Relay queue persistence: exiting preserves queue (including done/skipped state), auto-restored next time
- **New** Clipboard monitoring toggle persists, menu bar and settings stay in sync
- **Improve** Menu item renamed to "Pause/Resume Clipboard Monitoring" for clarity
- **Improve** Relay footer reorganised: Pause / Exit / Clear & Exit
- **Fix** Cmd+Shift+V and similar combos could not open quick panel while relay was active
- **Fix** Post-paste arrow keys in Excel were interpreted as Ctrl+Arrow (jumping to top)
- **Fix** Text was invisible in the relay edit panel (thanks @lclrc for the PR)
- **Fix** WebDAV connections to plain-HTTP endpoints
- **Fix** Grant Accessibility hint lingering after permission is granted
